# longestActivity

**Instance Property**

Access the date interval of the longest activity session during the activity segment.

## Declaration

```swift
var longestActivity: DateInterval?
```

## Discussion

This value may be `nil` if the person didn’t use this device during [doc://com.apple.DeviceActivity/documentation/DeviceActivity/DeviceActivityData/ActivitySegment/dateInterval].

## Measuring activity

- **totalActivityDuration**: Access the total activity time during the activity segment.

items.description: Access the total activity time during the activity segment.
